name: Egg Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C).
2. In a medium saucepan, scald the milk.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, vanilla, and sugar.
4. Carefully whisk some of the hot milk into the egg mixture, pouring in a slow steady stream.
5. Pour the custard mixture into 4 cups that hold 6 ounces each, and place them in an 8x8 baking pan.
6. Pour about half an inch of boiling water around the custard cups.
7. Sprinkle nutmeg on top of the custard if desired (optional).
8. Bake in the center of the preheated oven for 35 minutes until set, and a knife inserted into the middle comes out clean.
9. Serve warm or chilled.
